summary: Pristine soundboard capture of a classic 1976 performance, highlighted by a sublime second set.
review: All four reviewers rave about this recording, calling it “pristine,” “phenomenal” and noting the meticulous pitch‑correction, noise‑ and hum‑reduction work that makes the old FM broadcast sound like a fresh soundboard tape. The show itself is praised as a classic with an especially sublime second set, cementing its place among fans’ top‑five performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Uniform 5‑star reviews highlight both exceptional audio restoration and an outstanding performance, yielding a near‑perfect combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pitch correction, noise reduction and hum removal applied; reviewers describe the sound as crystal‑clear, pristine and immersive despite originating from an FM broadcast source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set repeatedly singled out as sublime; overall show regarded as a classic example of the July ’76 run.
